general.descriptionTextModule: Audit and reporting tools for Shopware stores

dashboard.issueGroupsSubtitle: Review grouped audit findings by severity and impact.
dashboard.scanCriteriaInfo: This scan reviews core store quality signals such as missing prices, descriptions, cover images, categories, manufacturers, translations, stock status, and selected SEO fields.
dashboard.runScanSuccess: Scan completed and dashboard updated successfully.
dashboard.runScanError: The scan could not be completed.
dashboard.loadError: The audit dashboard could not be loaded.
dashboard.emptyState: No audit data loaded yet, please run your first scan
dashboard.storeHealthInfo: Store Health is an overall quality score from 0 to 100. It is calculated from important audit issues such as out-of-stock products, missing prices, inactive products, missing descriptions, missing images, SEO-related gaps, and critical issues. More severe and more frequent problems reduce the score more strongly. To improve your score, fix critical issues first, then resolve content and SEO gaps.
dashboard.healthyHeadline: Great job — no critical issues need immediate attention.
dashboard.headlineOutOfStock: {count} products are out of stock and need immediate attention.
dashboard.headlineMissingPrice: {count} products are missing prices and should be fixed first.
dashboard.headlineMissingDescription: {count} products are missing descriptions and should be improved.
dashboard.headlineMissingMetaTitle: {count} products are missing SEO meta titles.
dashboard.healthSummaryGood: Your store is in good condition overall. Keep improving smaller quality gaps.
dashboard.healthSummaryWarning: Your store has several issues that may affect performance and should be reviewed soon.
dashboard.healthSummaryCritical: Your store has critical problems that can directly impact sales or customer experience.
dashboard.topTasksSubtitle: Review the most important audit tasks to improve store quality.
dashboard.topTasksInfo: These are the most important current audit tasks based on issue priority, impact, and affected products.
dashboard.salesInsightsSubtitle: Last 30 days · compared with the previous 30 days
dashboard.salesInsightsInfo: Revenue and order KPIs for the last 30 days, compared with the previous 30-day period.
dashboard.topSellingProductsInfo: Products with the highest number of sales based on recent order data.
dashboard.lowStockProductsInfo: Best-selling products that currently have low inventory and may need restocking soon.
dashboard.seoKpiSubtitle: Track the current SEO quality of audited products.
dashboard.seoAverageScoreHint: Weighted score across meta title, meta description, and description.
dashboard.seoNeedsImprovementHint: Products scoring below {threshold} are counted here.
dashboard.seoImprovementRateHint: Share of audited products below the SEO threshold.

dashboardImpact.missingDescription: May reduce product conversion and content quality.
dashboardImpact.missingCoverImage: Weak visual presentation can reduce customer interest.
dashboardImpact.inactiveProducts: These products are hidden and cannot generate sales.
dashboardImpact.outOfStockProducts: Out-of-stock products create direct revenue loss risk.
dashboardImpact.missingMetaTitle: Missing SEO meta titles can reduce search visibility.
dashboardImpact.missingCategory: Products may be harder for customers to discover.
dashboardImpact.missingManufacturer: Incomplete product data can reduce trust and filter quality.
dashboardImpact.missingPrice: Products without price cannot be purchased properly.
dashboardImpact.missingTranslation: Customers may see fallback language or incomplete content.
dashboardImpact.productMetaTitle: Meta titles are missing, too short, too long, identical to product names, or need SEO improvement.
dashboardImpact.productMetaDescription: Meta descriptions are missing, too short, too long, or need SEO improvement.
dashboardImpact.productName: Product names are missing or too short and may reduce clarity and SEO quality.
dashboardImpact.productDescription: Descriptions are missing or too short and may reduce SEO quality and product clarity.
dashboardImpact.categoryMissingMetaTitle: Missing category SEO meta titles can weaken category visibility.
dashboardImpact.categoryMissingMetaDescription: Missing category meta descriptions may reduce SEO click-through rate.
dashboardImpact.categoryMissingDescription: Thin category content may weaken SEO and user guidance.

findings.resultsSummary: Found {items} affected items in {groups} issue groups
findings.emptyFilteredState: No findings match the selected filters.
findings.loadError: The findings page could not be loaded.
findings.defaultImpact: May reduce store quality or customer experience.
findings.overviewTooltip: Overview of the latest audit findings by severity and affected entities.

tasks.loadError: The tasks page could not be loaded.
tasks.overviewTooltip: Overview of the latest generated task workload, priorities and affected entities.

detailSection.emptyState: Select a task from the list above to view its affected items and actions.
detailSection.noAffectedItems: No affected items are available for this task yet.

autoFix.previewError: Unable to load auto fix preview.

autoFixAll.modalTitle: Apply auto fix to all affected items
autoFixAll.success: Auto fix applied to {count} item | Auto fix applied to {count} items
autoFixAll.applyError: Unable to apply auto fix to all items.
autoFixAll.whatWillChangeText: The system will safely apply supported fixes to all affected items in this task.

dynamic.addMetaTitles: Add SEO meta titles to {count} product | Add SEO meta titles to {count} products
dynamic.addMetaDescriptions: Add SEO meta descriptions to {count} product | Add SEO meta descriptions to {count} products

reports.loadError: The reports page could not be loaded.
reports.overviewTooltip: Historical view of completed audit scans and report quality trends.

delete.confirmText: Delete {count} selected scan result? | Delete {count} selected scan results?
delete.warning: This will permanently delete the selected scan data including related findings and tasks.
delete.success: {count} report deleted successfully. | {count} reports deleted successfully.
delete.error: The selected reports could not be deleted.

settings.headline: Plugin settings
settings.description: Manage the audit configuration for Esmx Shop Audit AI directly in this module.

enableAudit.label: Enable audit checks
enableAudit.helpText: Enable or disable audit checks for the plugin.

auditProductLimit.label: Product audit limit per run
auditProductLimit.helpText: Maximum number of products scanned in one run.

variantAuditMode.label: Variant audit mode
variantAuditMode.helpText: Choose whether to audit effective storefront data or raw variant records.

taskTitles.complete_product_translations: Complete translations for {count} product | Complete translations for {count} products
taskTitles.review_product_meta_titles: Review SEO meta titles for {count} product | Review SEO meta titles for {count} products
taskTitles.review_product_meta_descriptions: Review SEO meta descriptions for {count} product | Review SEO meta descriptions for {count} products
taskTitles.review_product_names: Review product names for {count} product | Review product names for {count} products
taskTitles.assign_product_categories: Assign categories to {count} product | Assign categories to {count} products
taskTitles.review_product_descriptions: Review product descriptions for {count} product | Review product descriptions for {count} products
taskTitles.upload_product_images: Upload cover images for {count} product | Upload cover images for {count} products
taskTitles.assign_product_manufacturers: Assign manufacturers to {count} product | Assign manufacturers to {count} products
taskTitles.review_inactive_products: Review {count} inactive product | Review {count} inactive products
taskTitles.review_out_of_stock_products: Review {count} out-of-stock product | Review {count} out-of-stock products
taskTitles.add_product_prices: Add prices to {count} product | Add prices to {count} products

seoReasons.metaTitleIdenticalToProductName: Meta title is identical to the product name
